title: calonemorchis lindleyana
intro: Calonemorchis lindleyana, also known as the Lindley's calonemorchis, is a species of orchid native to India and Southeast Asia. It is a type of terrestrial orchid that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calonemorchis lindleyana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat respiratory problems, making it a valuable herb in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine. The herbal preparations of Calonemorchis lindleyana typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots and leaves to be made into teas, infusions, or powders for consumption.
